docs.text: Welcome! I'm a computer scientist with a strong interest in the social sciences and philosophy. I work in the School of Computer Science at the University of St Andrews in St Andrews, Scotland. At the moment, I am also a Technology Fellow at the Carr Center for Human Rights Policy at Harvard's John F. Kennedy School of Government and am also affiliated with the Department of Philosophy at Harvard . Contact School of Computer Science, University of St Andrews Jack Cole Building, North Haugh St Andrews KY16 9SX Room: JC 0.25 eMail: alex.voss@st-andrews.ac.uk Social media see footer. Academic Interests
